title: Fluorescent Focus Unit Assay using LICOR Imaging System
author: Bernardo Mainou
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k8fcztn

steps.title: Remove media from wells
steps.instruction: Remove media from wells.

steps.title: Wash 1x with Phosphate Buffered Saline (PBS)
steps.instruction: Wash 1x with Phosphate Buffered Saline (PBS).

steps.title: Add 100 uL ice-cold methanol per well
steps.instruction: Add 100 uL ice-cold methanol per well.

steps.title: Store plate at -20°C for at...
steps.instruction: Store plate at -20°C for at least 30 min (can remain at -20°C for several weeks).

steps.title: Remove methanol, allow plate to come...
steps.instruction: Remove methanol, allow plate to come to room temperature, and excess ethanol to evaporate.

steps.title: Wash wells with 150 ul PBS
steps.instruction: Wash wells with 150 ul PBS

steps.title: Add 150 uL Dulbecco’s PBS (DPBS) with 0
steps.instruction: Add 150 uL Dulbecco’s PBS (DPBS) with 0.5% Tween-20 (DPBS-T) to each well.

steps.title: Remove immediately
steps.instruction: Remove immediately.

steps.title: Add 50 uL rabbit anti-reovirus polyclonal...
steps.instruction: Add 50 uL rabbit anti-reovirus polyclonal antiserum (1:1000 dilution) in DPBS with 1% BSA (DPBS-BSA) to experimental wells. Add 50 uL DPBS-BSA with no antibody to background control.

steps.title: Incubate for 1 h at 37°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1 h at 37°C.

steps.title: Remove DPBS-BSA
steps.instruction: Remove DPBS-BSA.

steps.title: Wash 3x with DPBS-T for 5...
steps.instruction: Wash 3x with DPBS-T for 5 min each wash while shaking.

steps.title: Add 50 uL of DPBS-BSA to all wells
steps.instruction: Add 50 uL of DPBS-BSA to all wells.

steps.title: Incubate 1 h at 37°C
steps.instruction: Incubate 1 h at 37°C.

steps.title: Wash plates 3x with DPBS-T for 5 min each wash
steps.instruction: Wash plates 3x with DPBS-T for 5 min each wash.

steps.title: Prepare cell staining solution in DPBS-BSA
steps.instruction: Prepare cell staining solution in DPBS-BSA: Secondary antibody (e.g. Goat Anti Rabbit LICOR IRDye 800CW) - 1:1000 Draq5 - 1:10,000 Sapphire700 - 1:1000 Note: we have found that we get less background with the LICOR IRDye 800CW secondary antibody than with Goat Anti Rabbit Alexa 790)

steps.title: Add 50 uL cell staining solution...
steps.instruction: Add 50 uL cell staining solution to all wells that were treated with primary. Add 50 uL of DPBS-BSA with secondary antibody (1:1000) only to background control wells.

steps.title: Remove solution
steps.instruction: Remove solution.

steps.title: Incubate 1 h at 37°C
steps.instruction: Incubate 1 h at 37°C.

steps.title: Wash 3x with 150 uL DPBS-T
steps.instruction: Wash 3x with 150 uL DPBS-T.

steps.title: Add 50 uL of water
steps.instruction: Add 50 uL of water.

steps.title: Scan plates on LICOR Odyssey Imaging System
steps.instruction: Scan plates on LICOR Odyssey Imaging System. a. Focus offset = 3.0 (depends on the plates) b. 700nm Intensity = 6.5 c. 800nm Intensity = 7.5

steps.title: Plates and reagents
steps.instruction: Plates and reagents: Corning Black with clear bottom TC treated 96 well plates (Corning #3904) DRAQ5 #4084 from Cell Signaling Sapphire 700 #928-40022 from LICORAntibody 800 from LICOR (Life Technologies secondary antibodies give extra background and should be avoided)
